name: Phone
how_to_pay: Carrier app, the blue one. Log in, tap Pay, use the saved card.

name: Rent share
how_to_pay: Bank app, send to the saved person named for rent. Type the amount, confirm.

name: Internet
how_to_pay: Provider website, Pay My Bill button. Saved card.

name: Streaming
how_to_pay: Charges the saved card automatically. Just check it went through.

name: Renter insurance
how_to_pay: Insurance app. Amount varies; check the app for this month's number before paying.
